name: 3' Pre-lit Indexed Balsam Fir Mini Artificial Christmas Tree in Black Pot Warm White Lights - Wondershop™: LED, Battery-Operated
description:
This Pre-Lit Potted Balsam Fir Mini Artificial Christmas Tree Warm White Lights from Wondershop™ adds festive sparkle anywhere inside your home or in sheltered outdoors. This mini artificial Christmas tree is adorned with warm white LED lights in a black pot for easy placement on the ground. Display anywhere inside or in a sheltered outdoor spot to infuse your decor with celebratory vibes.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
